title: (Final) Smooth skin, Plastic skin, Beauty filter, airbrushed,
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Candid Snapshot Young Asian Man
prompt:
Ultra realistic candid snapshot of a young asian man sitting at a korean street-style restaurant table at night, leaning forward toward the camera while eating with chopsticks, holding food mid-bite near his mouth, direct eye contact, slightly curious playful expression, natural unposed moment,
wearing a relaxed-fit dark gray hoodie layered under an oversized denim jacket, casual street style, messy natural black hair, sunglasses resting on top of head, subtle accessories (ring, bracelet),
real skin texture with visible pores, tiny blemishes, uneven skin tone, slight oil shine, unretouched, no beauty filter,
table filled with korean food (tteokbokki, cheese rice, korean pancake, hot pot, side dishes), chopsticks, sauces, water bottle, canned drink, glass, smartphone placed casually,
background with metal wall panels, colorful posters, stickers, polaroids, warm string lights reflecting on window glass, cozy cluttered korean eatery at night,
harsh direct on-camera white flash, strong shadows, blown highlights, slightly overexposed face, low dynamic range,
imperfect framing, slightly tilted angle, off-center composition, snapshot feel,
visible film grain, chromatic aberration, color noise, slight motion blur,
early 2000s digital camera (CCD sensor), point-and-shoot aesthetic, raw, unedited, photorealistic
MidJourney Parameters (Dipertajam)
--ar 2:3 --v 6 --style raw --q 2 --s 150 --chaos 6
Negative Prompt (Final)
smooth skin, plastic skin, beauty filter, airbrushed, CGI, 3D render, cartoon, anime, HDR, overprocessed, over-sharpened, studio lighting, perfect lighting, symmetrical face, waxy skin.
